questions.question: Is a commercial license required for Obsidian if my company uses it for work?
questions.expected_answer: No — it is optional/voluntary, even for organizations. It is only encouraged, never required.
questions.note: Strongest trap question — several secondary sources wrongly claim this was required until Feb 2026.

questions.question: How much does Obsidian Sync cost per month?
How much does Obsidian Publish cost?
Can I get a refund on an Obsidian Commercial license?
questions.expected_answer: No — Commercial licenses (and Catalyst, and Obsidian Credit) are non-refundable. Only Sync and Publish have a 7-day refund window.
questions.note: Tests fine-grained policy distinction between add-on types.

questions.question: Is the core Obsidian app free for commercial/business use?
questions.expected_answer: Yes — the core app is free for both personal and commercial use, with no feature restrictions.

questions.question: Does Obsidian offer a student discount?
questions.expected_answer: Yes — 40% off Sync and Publish for verified students, faculty, and nonprofit employees. No other discounts are offered.

questions.question: How much is the Obsidian Catalyst license and what does it include?
questions.expected_answer: $25 one-time payment. Includes early beta access, community badges, and a VIP channel.

questions.question: Does Obsidian store or access my notes on their servers?
questions.expected_answer: No — data is stored locally by default and inaccessible to Obsidian. Sync data, if purchased, is end-to-end encrypted (AES-256).
